channel.title: What Is Being Built — Daily Activity Feed
channel.description: Daily updates on open-source automated research tools: commits, releases, and community activity.

item.title: Daily digest — 2026-07-19
item.description:
Our community has seen exciting progress across multiple projects. In the scienceverse/metacheck repository, a new addition was made to the `data_check` branch, introducing "japs jamovi" courtesy of Lakens. Meanwhile, the marton-balazs-kovacs/tenzing project has been bustling with activity, with Anka building the site for version 0.4.1 and Alex O. Holcombe making several commits to refine the wording and emphasis of the text on the `master` branch. Notably, these updates demonstrate the connections between our projects, with a focus on improving data checking and presentation. As our community continues to grow and collaborate, we celebrate these milestones and look forward to seeing the impact of these updates on our shared research goals. With these advancements, we're one step closer to enhancing our open-source research tools and fostering a more effective scientific community.

32 commits across 4 active repositories this week.

New releases: oddpub v7.3.0

Most active:

oddpub9 commits
metacheck8 commits
regcheck8 commits
tenzing7 commits
